name: agent-skills
description: just2d's collection of Claude Code Agent Skills, distributed as installable plugins.

plugins.name: codex-review
plugins.description: Get an independent code review from the local Codex CLI. Session-bound by default so one Codex conversation persists across review rounds; a --standalone mode handles one-off reviews.

plugins.name: browser-cdp
plugins.description: Inspect and control an already-running Chrome/Chromium browser over the Chrome DevTools Protocol on localhost:9222 — read tabs, extract text/HTML, screenshot, run JS, click/fill forms, open/navigate tabs — without stealing focus or changing the active tab. Pure-stdlib Python CLI, no dependencies.
